questions.question:
पंक्ति पूरी कीजिए:
बच्चों लाओ फिर वही बात, ________
questions.explanation:
English meaning of the question: Complete the line: Children, bring back that same message, ________.

English meaning of the answer: Let us live together with love.

questions.question:
पंक्ति पूरी कीजिए:
पास-पड़ोसी सुख-दुख बाँटें, ________
questions.explanation:
English meaning of the question: Complete the line: Let neighbours share their joys and sorrows, ________.

English meaning of the answer: Such feelings should exist in everyone.

questions.question:
पंक्ति पूरी कीजिए:
पंथ अलग हैं, धर्म एक है, ________
questions.explanation:
English meaning of the question: Complete the line: Paths are different, faith is one, ________.

English meaning of the answer: The same one God is present in everyone.

questions.question:
पंक्ति पूरी कीजिए:
रक्त सभी का लाल एक है, ________
questions.explanation:
English meaning of the question: Complete the line: Everyone's blood is the same red colour, ________.

English meaning of the answer: May the hand of love grow day by day.

questions.question:
सही क्रम में लिखिए:
(1) पंथ अलग हैं, धर्म एक है
(2) रक्त सभी का लाल एक है
(3) सबमें ईश्वर वही एक है
(4) दिन-नित बढ़े प्रेम का हाथ
questions.explanation:
English meaning of the question: Write the lines in the correct order.

English meaning of the answer: The correct order is 1, 3, 2, and 4.

questions.question: कविता की उस पंक्ति को लिखिए जिसमें पड़ोसियों के बीच प्रेम और सहयोग की बात कही गई है।
questions.answer:
पास-पड़ोसी सुख-दुख बाँटें,
ऐसे हों सबमें जज्बात।।
questions.explanation:
English meaning of the question: Write the lines that speak about love and cooperation among neighbours.

English meaning of the answer: Neighbours should share one another's joys and sorrows. Such feelings should exist in everyone.

questions.question: कविता की वह पंक्ति लिखिए जिसमें ईश्वर की एकता व्यक्त की गई है।
questions.explanation:
English meaning of the question: Write the line that expresses the unity of God.

English meaning of the answer: The same one God is present in everyone.

questions.question: कविता की वह पंक्ति लिखिए जिसमें समानता का विचार आता है।
questions.answer: रक्त सभी का लाल एक है।
questions.explanation:
English meaning of the question: Write the line that shows equality.

English meaning of the answer: Everyone's blood is the same red colour.

questions.question:
रिक्त स्थान भरिए:
दिन-नित बढ़े ________ का हाथ।
questions.explanation:
English meaning of the question: Fill in the blank: May the hand of ________ grow day by day.

English meaning of the answer: The answer is love.

questions.question:
रिक्त स्थान भरिए:
ऐसे हों सबमें ________।
questions.explanation:
English meaning of the question: Fill in the blank: Such ________ should exist in everyone.

English meaning of the answer: The answer is feelings.

questions.question: कविता के आधार पर लिखिए: कवि बच्चों से किस प्रकार का साथ चाहता है?
questions.answer: कवि बच्चों से प्यार का साथ चाहता है।
questions.explanation:
English meaning of the question: According to the poem, what kind of companionship does the poet want for children?

English meaning of the answer: The poet wants children to live with love and companionship.

questions.question: कविता के आधार पर लिखिए: कौन-सा रंग सबके रक्त का बताया गया है?
questions.answer: सबके रक्त का रंग लाल बताया गया है।
questions.explanation:
English meaning of the question: According to the poem, what colour is everyone's blood said to be?

English meaning of the answer: Everyone's blood is said to be red.
